✦ Independent & Free

No tiers. No charges. Just intention.

Sila is completely independent and free to use. We do not sell better visibility, paid access, or premium treatment — everyone is welcomed with the same care.

✦ The Weekly Ritual

Choose Your Intention

Two portals. One thoughtful ritual.

First choose what you're truly looking for. Only then do we ask meaningful questions and craft introductions for you.

♥
Romance Portal

Romance

For people seeking genuine romantic compatibility, emotional depth, and the kind of attraction that lasts.

  • Compatibility-based matching
  • Premium, intimate atmosphere
  • Curated weekly introductions
  • Inclusive identity & preferences
✧
Friends Portal

Friends

For people seeking real friends, shared activities, and a sense of belonging — without any romantic pressure.

  • Social compatibility focus
  • Calm, welcoming atmosphere
  • Activity & vibe based matching
  • Study, hangouts, hobbies, more
Sign up required

Ready to begin?

Your first curated introduction is just minutes away. No public profile. No endless swiping. Private by design.

The Journey

What happens after you join?

Once you create your account, you’ll answer a thoughtful set of questions designed to understand who you are and what kind of connection you’re looking for.

Every Friday at 6 PM, we send a small number of curated introductions based on compatibility. You’ll receive thoughtful matches — never more than a handful.

No endless swiping. No public profiles. Just meaningful connections when the time feels right.
💌

The best people arrive by invitation

The most meaningful communities aren't found — they're built, one thoughtful invitation at a time. If someone comes to mind, they probably belong here.

The Ritual

How Sila works

A simple, intentional procedure — not a swipe-driven loop.

01

Choose your intention

Pick either the Romance Portal or the Friends Portal before anything else.

02

Answer meaningfully

Complete a thoughtful, portal-specific questionnaire that captures who you really are.

03

Receive introductions

Get compatibility-based introductions delivered every Friday at 6:00 PM.

04

Show interest safely

Express interest without pressure — no public profiles, no swipe walls.

05

Connect when mutual

Contact details are only revealed after mutual interest and a safety reminder.

Features

Different by design

Sila was built around what most apps avoid: real intention, real depth, and real privacy.

✦

No endless swiping

Curated introductions only — no infinite feed designed to trap you.

✧

No fake urgency

A weekly ritual, not artificial countdowns or pressure-driven popups.

⋆

Real compatibility

Weighted matching engines built around what actually creates connection.

✶

Separate worlds

Romance and Friends live in fully separate portals — never mixed.

✷

Inclusive by default

Broader gender identities and an Everyone / All preference in both portals.

♥

Built to be deleted

The goal is meeting someone real, not keeping you trapped in an app.

Safety & Respect

Connection with care

Contact information is never revealed casually. Before any details are shared, a safety reminder appears — because real introductions deserve real respect.

  • Contact details only after mutual interest
  • Safety reminder before any reveal
  • Respect boundaries, always
  • Report harmful behavior easily
  • Built for intentional, mature adults

Questions

Things you might wonder

Is Sila only for dating?+
No. Sila has two completely separate portals — Romance for dating, and Friends for genuine friendship. Use either, or both.
Can I use it just to find friends?+
Absolutely — the Friends Portal is live now. It's a full experience with its own warm, casual 39-question questionnaire built around social compatibility, not a watered-down version of dating.
How are matches made?+
Each portal uses its own weighted compatibility engine that compares your answers with others. Romance weighs values and communication most heavily; Friends prioritises lifestyle (40%), vibe (25%), and shared values (25%). You'll see a real compatibility score and why you matched on each introduction.
When are introductions revealed?+
Every Friday at 6:00 PM — the weekly ritual. The countdown above tracks it live.
Is contact information shown immediately?+
No. Contact details are only revealed after both people show mutual interest, and only after a safety reminder is acknowledged.
Can I choose who I want to meet?+
Yes. You set your own gender identity and preferences — including an Everyone / All option — in both portals.
Get In Touch

Say hello

Questions, feedback, or partnership ideas — we'd love to hear from you.

Reach the Sila team

Tap the email below to compose a message in Gmail.

Romance Matches ♥

Your romantic introductions. Kept completely separate from Friends.

✦

Your introductions arrive this Friday at 6:00 PM

Your questionnaire is complete. We're carefully preparing a small, considered set of introductions just for you — no endless scrolling, just a few people worth meeting.

You'll see your matches here the moment the ritual begins.

Friends Matches ✧

Curated friendship introductions, every Friday at 6:00 PM.

✧

Find your people

Answer a few warm, casual questions about how you live, your vibe, and what you value in a friend. Then we'll introduce you to people you'll genuinely click with.

Your Friends answers are kept completely separate from Romance.

✧

Your introductions arrive this Friday at 6:00 PM

Your Friends questionnaire is complete. We're preparing a small, considered set of introductions — people whose lifestyle, vibe, and values line up with yours.

You'll see your matches here the moment the ritual begins.

This Week's Introductions

Your most compatible people across both portals. New introductions arrive every Friday at 6:00 PM.

🛡️ Privacy
⚙️ Account

Your right to erasure is protected under India's DPDP Act 2023 and GDPR.

Admin Panel

Manage reports, users, and moderation settings.

Title

✦
Preparing your introductions
Finding your most compatible alignments…
🛡

A gentle reminder

Before you enter, please carry these principles with you.

  • Be respectful, always
  • Respect boundaries others set
  • Contact only with good intent
  • Stay safe when meeting in person
  • Report harmful behavior
🤝

Before we reveal

You are about to receive each other's contact details. Please carry these with you.

  • Reach out with genuine, respectful intent
  • Respect their boundaries and pace
  • Never share their contact with others
  • If something feels wrong, report it
⚐

Report or block

Tell us what happened with this person. Reports are reviewed by our team — thank you for helping keep Sila safe.

🗑️

Delete all my data

This is permanent and cannot be undone. All your answers, preferences, matches, and connections will be erased.

  • Your questionnaire answers will be deleted
  • Your match history will be removed
  • Your contact preference will be erased
  • Your account will be deactivated

Type DELETE to confirm

💌

Pass the invitation

Great communities grow through people, not algorithms. Share Sila with someone who values depth over distraction.

Legal
